name: ai-dial-ci (isolated)
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh && cp /tmp/known_hosts.seed ~/.ssh/known_hosts && chmod 600 ~/.ssh/known_hosts && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bats shellcheck && sudo wget -qO /usr/local/bin/yq https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/latest/download/yq_linux_amd64 && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/yq && npm install -g semver @anthropic-ai/claude-code
